category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates documentation from DocBook; KDE API reference describes KDocTools as documentation generation from docbook.
display_name_sources: KDE Invent project page title is KDocTools; KDE API reference page is titled KDocTools.
docs_sources: KDE API Reference provides the official KDocTools documentation and clone/source links.
repo_sources: KDE API Reference lists HTTPS clone URL https://invent.kde.org/frameworks/kdoctools.git and browse source on invent.kde.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; KDE API Reference identifies KDocTools as a KDE Framework for DocBook documentation generation.
